changelog: v3.9 (aggressive tier): sharpen the defensive switch (tau 0.05->0.03) + hold max equity in a confirmed uptrend (uptrend_ceiling 0.1->0.0) + lengthen the cross-momentum lookback (15->18mo). +1.6pp full-cycle CAGR (16.2->17.8%) with worst-12mo UNCHANGED (-11.9%); maxDD -19.6->-22.3% is a deliberate aggressive-tier spend of the crowding-tune floor. Sub-period validated in both halves; turnover flat. Part of the ETF-only consolidation.
